# MobilityGrid

> Fleet Operating System for India — digital rent collection, driver KYC, real-time tracking, and fleet management for EV and gig economy operators.

MobilityGrid is a SaaS platform for India's fleet operators and gig workers. Fleet owners manage vehicles, collect rent digitally, track drivers, handle KYC verification, and view earnings — all in one place.

## Docs

- [Fleet Owner Dashboard](https://mobilitygrid.in/owner/dashboard): Manage vehicles, drivers, rent collection, and earnings
- [Driver App](https://mobilitygrid.in/driver/dashboard): Driver PWA for payments, attendance, and wallet
- [Get Early Access](https://mobilitygrid.in/#signup): Sign up form for new fleet owners
- [Partner Network](https://partners.mobilitygrid.in/): EV and gig economy fleet partner directory
- [Login](https://mobilitygrid.in/login): Sign in to the platform

## Optional

- [Backend API](https://mg-qw5s.onrender.com/): REST API base URL (auth required for most endpoints)

## About

- **Fleet Owners / Operators**: Manage vehicles, collect rent digitally, track drivers, view earnings dashboard
- **Fleet Managers**: Oversee operations, manage driver onboarding, handle KYC approvals
- **Drivers / Riders**: Track dues, make payments, view attendance, communicate with owner

Key features: UPI + Cash rent collection, PayYantra KYC verification, real-time GPS tracking, automated daily rent deduction, attendance tracking, partner network, multi-owner company management.

## Contact

- Website: https://mobilitygrid.in
- Partners: https://partners.mobilitygrid.in
- Support: mobilitygrid@gmail.com
